question: what about contract
answer: The contract is a Service Agreement between Sameena Consulting AB and Sam & Co AB, with a contract number of CONTRACT-2026-001. It starts on January 1, 2026, and ends on December 31, 2026. The services provided include software integration consulting, ERP system support (iScala and Rillion), and monthly technical reporting. The monthly retainer fee is $2,500.00, with payment due 30 days after the invoice date. There is a late payment fee of 2% per month on overdue amounts. Both parties agree to keep all business information confidential for 3 years after contract termination, and either party may terminate the agreement with 30 days written notice. The governing law is Swedish law.
